headline: Wells Fargo Downgrades Nike to Equal Weight: GLP-1 Mega-Trend Threatens the Athletic Wear Giant
summary: Wells Fargo just delivered a contrarian gut check to Nike (NYSE:NKE) stock bulls, downgrading the athletic wear giant to Equal Weight from Overweight and trimming its price target to $45 from $55. The call lands with Nike stock already under pressure, down roughly 30% year to date (YTD) and off 25% over the past year. ... Wells Fargo Downgrades Nike to Equal Weight: GLP-1 Mega-Trend Threatens the Athletic Wear Giant

headline: What Might The Fed Do After April's Red Hot Inflation Report
summary: Nasdaq QQQs reached an all-time high as April's job growth and steady unemployment validate the Fed's decision to hold rates. Read full analysis here.
